notes_for_human_reviewer: Solid intermediate-to-strong submission. Names three of the unstated functions (memory, early-warning on slip, written-record author) but doesn't get to four+ (no friction-reduction or shock-absorber). Self-placement is grounded in scope ('I'm not running a workstream end-to-end yet'). Habits have cadence + audience + definition-of-done. Voice is plain. Two unknowns are paired with concrete how-to-find-out. All five dims should land 4 — close to ceiling but not at it because role_breadth doesn't hit the four-or-more threshold. Tolerance 1; this fixture should be a clean pass for a calibrated grader.
